title: Building Construction Quality Manager (QAQC) #78348
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Construction Main Contractor
  • Position Title: QAQC Manager
  • Working Location: Based at project site
  • Working Hours: 5.5 days / Mon-Fri: 8am-5pm, Sat: 8am-12pm
  • Salary Package: Up to SGD 8,500 + Discretionary Bonus + Allowance
  • Duration: Permanent

Key Responsibilities

  • Establish and oversee effective in-process quality control systems across approximately 7 ongoing condominium projects
  • Promote and implement best practices in quality control across multiple projects to ensure consistency and compliance
  • Lead project teams in the preparation and execution of QM and CONQUAS assessments, ensuring readiness and adherence to quality standards
  • Perform daily QA/QC inspections to ensure site compliance with quality standards
  • Compile and submit monthly QA/QC reports to the Corporate QA/QC Department
  • Conduct monthly QA/QC training sessions for subcontractors to reinforce quality standards and best practices
  • Issue non-compliance reports (NCRs) to subcontractors and follow up on corrective actions
  • Attend monthly QA/QC meetings and presentations with the Corporate QA/QC Department
  • Carry out regular inspections to verify that works are executed in accordance with approved method statements, BCA’s Good Industry Practice, and client/consultant requirements
  • Coordinate with BCA for CONQUAS and Quality Mark (QM) assessments; act as the key liaison for quality-related matters with clients and consultants, especially regarding CONQUAS scoring
  • Collaborate closely with site engineers and supervisors to ensure construction activities meet CONQUAS standards, provide technical guidance on quality requirements, and deliver training where necessary

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Degree preferably background in either architectural or structural disciplines
  • Min. of 5 years’ experience as a QAQC Manager or Assistant QAQC Manager with an A1-grade main building contractor
  • Must have BCA-Approved CONQUAS Manager and Quality Mark Certificate
  • Experience in handling Quality Mark assessments or certification processes is a plus
  • Solid understanding of construction quality control and assurance practices

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #78348 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
